name: Harvest Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 small zucchini, halved and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME
1. Chop one onion; set aside.
2. Place the remaining two onions, chicken, water, celery, salt, and pepper in a Dutch oven. Cover and simmer for 2 hours or until the chicken is tender. Remove the chicken; set aside. Discard the celery and onions.
3. Add the diced tomatoes with liquid, carrots, instant chicken bouillon to the broth. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes or until the carrots are tender.
4. Debone and cube the chicken; add it back to the soup along with zucchini and peas.
5. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes or until the zucchini is tender.
6. Spoon into bowls.
7. Garnish with avocado.
